text: - HIGH [app.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/crates/29er-tui/src/app.rs:397): every visited channel gets a retained `GroupChatProjection` observer in `self.chats`, with no close/unregister. Memory and work scale with visited history, not the open view. Keep only active-view projections or close previous group-chat interest/snapshot.
